response: Charles A. Agemian had more career changes than Arshile Gorky. Agemian retired from Chase Manhattan Bank early and became chairman and CEO of Hackensack Trust Co., later renamed Garden State National Bank. He did not have a significant career change in terms of artistic or professional direction, but his professional career involved multiple transitions. Arshile Gorky, on the other hand, had a more stable and consistent career in the art world, with a long and influential career in abstract expressionism.
